name: Crushed
short_description: Crushed — is an Singleplayer and Multiplayer First-Person Survival Sandbox in an Open World! Challenge the wild and be ready to survive in harsh conditions. Explore the world, get resources, cook food, build a house, farm, hunt, and enjoy nature.
detailed_description:
Crushed — is an Singleplayer and Multiplayer First-Person Survival Sandbox in an Open World! Challenge the wild and be ready to survive in harsh conditions. Explore the world, get resources, cook food, build a house, farm, hunt, and enjoy nature.

Features

  • Multiplayer and Singleplayer
    Survive alone, or together with your friends.

  • Crafting Items
    Create items, weapons and construction items using the resources you find.

  • Building System
    Build your own house and equip it according to your own taste and preferences.

  • Animals
    Hunt or become prey.

  • Farming
    Find grains and create your own farms.

  • Gathering Ore
    Mine ore, melt it in a furnace and use ingots to create items.

  • Item Durability
    Your tools and weapons have a durability bar.

  • Natural Needs
    Mechanics of health, stamina, thirst and hunger.

  • Day and Night cycle.
    Change of time of day with atmospheric phenomena.

  • Cooking Food
    Food can be grown, hunted, and cooked.

  • Food Expiration Date
    Food ceases to be edible if it is not stored in the refrigerator.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Turkish, French, Spanish - Spain, Ukrainian, Korean, German
